```tactics
import Mathlib

theorem well_typed_well_typed' {╬╡} {e : ExprLow Ident Typ} :
  e.well_formed ╬╡ тЖТ
  e.well_typed ╬╡ тЖТ
  e.well_typed' ╬╡ := by
  induction e with
  | base inst typ =>
    intro hwf hwt; dsimp [well_typed', build_module_interface', well_typed'', well_formed] at *
    split at hwf
    rename_i _ _ heq; rw [heq]; constructor; simp [Option.map]; rfl
    contradiction
  | product e1 e2 he1 he2 =>
    intro hwf; intro hwt
    dsimp [well_typed', build_module_interface', well_typed'', well_formed] at *
    simp at hwf; dsimp [well_typed] at hwt
    specialize he1 hwf.1 hwt.1
    specialize he2 hwf.2 hwt.2
    obtain тЯиmi1, hb1, hwt1тЯй := he1
    obtain тЯиmi2, hb2, hwt2тЯй := he2
    rw [hb1, hb2]
    dsimp; constructor
    and_intros; rfl;
    all_goals sorry
```

```tactics
    simp at hwf; dsimp [well_typed] at hwt
    specialize he1 hwf.1 hwt.1
    specialize he2 hwf.2 hwt.2
    obtain тЯиmi1, hb1, hwt1тЯй := he1
    obtain тЯиmi2, hb2, hwt2тЯй := he2
    rw [hb1, hb2]
    dsimp; constructor
    and_intros; rfl;
    all_goals sorry
```

Next, we'll complete the product case. The goal for the product case is:
`тКв e1.well_formed ╬╡ тЖТ e1.well_typed ╬╡ тЖТ e2.well_formed ╬╡ тЖТ e2.well_typed ╬╡ тЖТ (e1 тИШ e2).well_typed' ╬╡`

```tactics

theorem well_typed_well_typed' {╬╡} {e : ExprLow Ident Typ} :
  e.well_formed ╬╡ тЖТ
  e.well_typed ╬╡ тЖТ
  e.well_typed' ╬╡ := by
  induction e with
  | base inst typ =>
    intro hwf hwt
    simp [well_typed', well_formed] at hwf hwt тКв
    all_goals tauto
  | product e1 e2 he1 he2 =>
    intro hwf1 hwf2 hwf3 hwf4 hwt1 hwt2
    simp [well_typed', build_module_interface', well_typed'', well_formed] at *
```
